final_answer: Clinical operations MUST ESCALATE activation of trial site B-18 under protocol P8.1 with consent C12 on 2026-06-28. Activation authority AUTH-BOR-082 explicitly states consent C12 remains pending - this qualifier is the controlling language for consent-status class and cannot be abstracted away as operational equivalent to CLOSED. The consent-status class is PENDING not CLOSED per AUTH-BOR-082 verbatim. STD-BOR-082-P requires consent-status class in activation authority before enrollment; AUTH-BOR-082 does not close this class because consent remains pending. Feasibility note FEAS-BOR-082 is planning-only and does not resolve the pending consent-status class. The prior artifact incorrectly treated 'current IRB-approved consent C12' as equivalent to consent-status-class CLOSED without addressing the explicit 'remains pending' qualifier in the same document - this is a substantive misinterpretation of controlling source language.
